philosophy-of-the-teachings-of-islam.preview_text: PASTE THE FIRST 400-500 WORDS OF THE BOOK HERE. You can get this from the alislam.org/library digital version or from the physical book itself. This preview gives readers a taste of the writing style.
philosophy-of-the-teachings-of-islam.call_to_action: This preview covers the opening of the essay. The full text spans 120 pages covering the physical, moral, and spiritual states of man — a masterwork of Islamic philosophy.

jesus-in-india.call_to_action: This preview introduces the central thesis. The complete book presents evidence from the Gospels, medical science, historical records, and the tomb in Kashmir.

revelation-rationality-knowledge-and-tru.call_to_action: This preview opens the 700+ page investigation into science, reason, and divine revelation — one of the most comprehensive modern Islamic works.
